calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Nov-16-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-07-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Sidney Sheray, Esq. for Petitioner: Judith Alcantara, present as Guardian at litem for and with: Yesenia Caceres, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $6,038.00 is approved.
Attorney's Fees $1,509.50
A net balance of $4,528.50 to be depositted into a blocked account with Patelco Credit Union , 156 2nd Street, San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
The remaining proceeds to be used for purchase of an ANNUITY as described in Exhibit " A".
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2004 Text Ruling
